role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused on Bengali script and language distribution.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, soil, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Discussed tropical deciduous species and biome.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Identified green CNG auto-rickshaws and road infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized vehicle styles, wiring, and roofing materials.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Bangladesh. The agents provided strong, image-grounded evidence (Bengali script, green CNGs) and the tournament logic correctly prioritized these diagnostic features over the similar but less specific Indian context.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Bengali script clearly visible on signs.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Flat terrain and roadside shops match description.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Trees visible in background match tropical deciduous description.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Green CNGs and wiring match description.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Construction materials and vehicle styles match.
